message:
style(core): cargo fmt formatting fixes across runtime, storage, search, and benchmarks

Minor formatting adjustments from cargo fmt, plus one functional fix:

runtime.rs:
- Collapse multi-line recv_mpsc helper to single-line .await.expect() chain

storage.rs:
- Collapse multi-line recv_mpsc helper to single-line .await.expect() chain
- Reflow timeout wrapper to fit line width

snapshot_engine.rs:
- Collapse multi-line assert_eq! for recv_trigger to single line

tailer.rs:
- Change two `let (tx, rx)` bindings to `let (tx, mut rx)` — rx is mutated
  by recv() calls but was previously not marked mut (Rust 2024 warns on this)

search/chunk_vector_store.rs:
- Reflow chained .upsert_chunk_embedding() calls to standard .method() style
- Replace f32 test value 3.14 with 2.75 to avoid float precision issues
- Use (hit.score - parsed.score).abs() < f64::EPSILON instead of direct eq
- Collapse single-line semantic_search call

search/chunking.rs:
- Reorder RecorderOffset fields (byte_offset before ordinal) to match struct
  definition order
- Import reordering to alphabetical
- Reflow make_egress_event calls, collapse make_input calls
- Replace `assert!(chunks.len() >= 1)` with idiomatic `assert!(!chunks.is_empty())`
- Add `min_chunk_chars: 1` to 3 test configs to prevent glue-back of tiny chunks
  that would collapse separate boundary-triggered chunks into one
- Rename event1/event2 to ev_a/ev_b and events to inputs in session_id test for
  clarity

benches/task_spawn.rs:
- Reflow spawn_bounded_with_cx call arguments to fit column width

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
